server.bootstrap_system_blocked: 🚨 System blocked: too many global bootstrap attempts
server.bootstrap_rate_limit_ip_detail: Too many attempts from your IP. Wait 5 minutes.
server.bootstrap_not_available_env: Bootstrap not available in this environment
server.bootstrap_access_denied_ip: Access denied from this IP address
server.bootstrap_token_not_initialized: Server not ready - bootstrap token not initialized
server.bootstrap_token_used: Token already used. Restart server or regenerate token.
server.bootstrap_token_expired: Token expired. Restart server to generate new token.
server.bootstrap_token_invalid: Invalid token. Check the terminal for the correct code.
server.bootstrap_next_step_1: 1. Use X-Session-Token header for initial requests
server.bootstrap_next_step_2: 2. Generate permanent API key via POST /api/keys/generate
server.bootstrap_session_token_sent: Session token sent to client (15 min TTL)
server.bootstrap_token_still_active: Current token still active and not used yet
server.ollama_not_available: Ollama not available (localhost:11434). If using Ollama, start it manually.
server.no_new_modules: No new modules discovered in this cycle
server.application_ready: Application started and ready to receive requests
server.bootstrap_token_copy_instruction: COPY this code to the browser when prompted
server.bootstrap_token_generated: Bootstrap token persisted to DB (expires in {minutes} min)
server.rate_limit_cleanup_started: Phase 3.1: Rate limit cleanup task started
server.api_integrator_unavailable: API integrator not available (integration module missing)

security.production_no_allowlist:
SECURITY ERROR: NEXE_APPROVED_MODULES is required in production mode.
Please set NEXE_APPROVED_MODULES environment variable with a comma-separated list of approved modules.
Example: export NEXE_APPROVED_MODULES='security,observability,rag'
security.staging_no_allowlist_warning: Staging mode without NEXE_APPROVED_MODULES - all discovered modules will be loaded
security.development_no_allowlist: Development mode: All discovered modules allowed (no allowlist)

server.kill_failed: Could not terminate process on port {port}. Try manually: lsof -ti:{port} | xargs kill
server.find_port_usage: To find what's using the port: lsof -ti:{port}

chat.context_instruction: Use this retrieved information if relevant:
chat.ollama_no_chat_models: No chat model downloaded in Ollama. Run: ollama pull llama3.2
chat.ollama_not_available: Ollama not available. The server is starting or Ollama is not installed. Wait a few seconds and try again, or run: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh
chat.ollama_no_response: Ollama is not responding. Verify it is running: ollama serve
chat.ollama_stream_not_available: Ollama not available. Wait a few seconds and try again.

middleware.rate_limit_fallback: Falling back to basic rate limiting

cors.wildcard_not_allowed: CORS wildcard '*' not allowed in air-gapped mode. Define explicit origins in server.toml [core.server] cors_origins
cors.origins_not_configured: CORS origins not configured. Define explicit origins in server.toml [core.server] cors_origins

ingest.title: NEXE KNOWLEDGE INGESTION
ingest.subtitle: Add your documents to the 'knowledge/' folder
ingest.server_hint: Make sure the server is running: ./nexe go
ingest.done_prompt: You can now ask about your documents in chat!
